title: Tahir Captures Baghdad
description: In this year, Khuzaymah b. Khazim disobeyed Muhammad b. Harun, separated himself from him, and sought a promise of safety from Tihir b. al-Husayn.` 2 Harthamah entered the eastern part [of Baghdad[. A report concerning why Khuzaymah left Muhammad, how this turned out, and how he became obedient to Tahir follows.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 31
